CE1.justification: Acted directly; no clarifying questions and no demand to reconstruct context.

CE2.justification: Verdict, file path, MISSING tally, and the 'cheap to clear' closer in a single tight paragraph — no preamble or process narration in the user-facing reply.

CE3.justification: Names the checklist path and the reason for the No-go (which inputs are MISSING) in one in-line clause.

CE4.justification: Single artifact (checklist.md with decision section appended); deliberately skipped daybook for a single-task run, so no orphan artifacts.
